item.title: docs: update Greptile sponsor placement
feat(mcp): single-connector default set + connector policy (#2219)
item.description: Reduce the default .mcp.json to one connector (chrome-devtools) per the new policy in docs/MCP-CONNECTOR-POLICY.md: a default earns its slot only if it is universal AND MCP beats a CLI/API wrapped in a skill. June 2026 audit verdicts: github -> gh via github-ops skill; context7 -> REST via documenta

item.title: ci: remove copilot code-review surface
release: 2.0.0 — the agent harness operating system
item.description: Graduate 2.0.0-rc.1 to stable. Bump version across package, plugin, marketplace, OpenCode, agent metadata, VERSION, and all localized docs. Add 2.0.0 release notes + README sections (en/zh/pt-BR/tr), CHANGELOG entry, and the ECC community Discord bot (dependency-free gateway client + guild command r

item.title: ci: harden workflows and sponsor code review config
ci: harden release announce checkout
docs: fix README markdownlint spacing
security: harden advisory intake and dependency coverage
docs: refresh sponsor and readme surface
feat(discord): release -> #announcements auto-post + pin + GitHub Discussions (#2201)
item.description: On a published GitHub release, post the notes to the ECC Discord #announcements channel (via bot), pin it, and cross-post to GitHub Discussions (Announcements category). Release data flows through env vars (no shell interpolation of untrusted input). Secrets: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN, DISCORD_ANNOUNCE_CHAN

item.title: feat: add orch-* orchestrator skill family (#2153)
item.description: * feat: add orch-* orchestrator skill family Lightweight wrappers that orchestrate existing ECC agents through a gated Research -> Plan -> TDD -> Review -> Commit pipeline, right-sized per task. - orch-pipeline: shared engine (phases, size classifier, two gates, agent map) - orch-add-feature/chang

item.title: fix: make plugin hooks run on Node 21+ and green the suite under modern Node (#2184)
item.description: ROOT CAUSE: hooks load plugin-hook-bootstrap.js via `node -e "...; process.argv.splice(1,0,s); require(s)"`. On Node 21+, require.main is `undefined` under --eval, so the `if (require.main === module)` guard was false and main() never ran — every plugin hook silently no-op'd (e.g. the MCP-health Pre

item.title: fix(codex): update bundled defaults to GPT 5.5 (#2132)
feat(skills): add laravel-security, laravel-tdd, and php-reviewer agent (#2122)
item.description: * feat(skills): add laravel-security, laravel-tdd, and php-reviewer agent * fix: resolve code review findings across laravel-security, laravel-tdd, and php-reviewer - laravel-security: replace env() with config() in runtime code, replace wildcard trusted proxies with CIDR ranges, remove blanket

item.title: feat(skills): add fastapi-patterns skill (#2129)
docs: fix renamed-repo links, drop stale assessment artifacts (#2058)
item.description: CONTRIBUTING.md still pointed at the old `affaan-m/everything-claude-code` repo URL in the Quick Start fork instructions and in the Issues link at the bottom. Both relied on GitHub's silent rename-redirect, but the literal `cd everything-claude-code` after `gh repo fork` would land in the wrong dire

item.title: fix(commands): resolve active plugin root in /instinct-status (#2037) (#2059)
item.description: The `/instinct-status` slash command template expanded `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` directly and documented a manual-install fallback to `~/.claude/skills/continuous-learning-v2/scripts/instinct-cli.py`. When users had both an active plugin install (under `~/.claude/plugins/cache/<slug>/<org>/<version>/`

item.title: docs: add Urdu (ur) README translation (#2061)
item.description: * docs: add Urdu (ur) README translation Adds docs/ur/README.md — a full Urdu translation of the main README. Urdu is spoken by 230M+ people globally, with a large developer community in Pakistan. This follows the same structure as existing translations (de-DE, ja-JP, ko-KR, etc.). * docs(ur): syn

item.title: feat: Cursor-independent ECC memory via ECC_AGENT_DATA_HOME (#2066)
item.description: * feat: auto-isolate ECC memory data for Cursor via ECC_AGENT_DATA_HOME Add ECC_AGENT_DATA_HOME (defaults to ~/.claude) with Cursor-aware resolution, sessionStart env injection, install scaffolds, and hook bootstrap so memory hooks do not collide with Claude Code when both harnesses are used. Clos

item.title: fix(docs): sync marketplace add URL across translated READMEs (#2050) (#2068)
item.description: PR #2050 updated the root README.zh-CN.md install commands after the everything-claude-code → ECC rename, but the same stale marketplace URL remained in nine docs/<locale>/README.md copies. Align those quick-start and self-hosted install blocks so /plugin install ecc@ecc resolves the ecc marketplace

item.title: feat: MCP inventory (ecc.mcp.v1) — unified cross-harness MCP config view (#2146)
item.description: * feat: add MCP inventory (ecc.mcp.v1) across harnesses Read-only MCP-gateway groundwork: discover MCP server configs across every installed harness, normalize to a canonical ecc.mcp.v1 inventory, redact secrets, and report which servers are configured in 2+ harnesses (the configure-N-times pain).

item.title: feat: extend session-adapter layer with codex-worktree + opencode adapters (#2145)
item.description: * feat: add codex-worktree session adapter Adds the third session adapter (after dmux-tmux and claude-history), normalizing Codex rollout sessions into the harness-neutral ecc.session.v1 snapshot. Reads ~/.codex/sessions rollout JSONL, derives objective (skipping the AGENTS.md preamble + leading me

item.title: feat: add dynamic workflow team orchestration surface
item.description: Adds dynamic workflow/team orchestration skills, the content pack, and control-pane work-item/Kanban state DB support. Includes reviewer hardening for state-db CLI validation, optional state DB failure handling, and mergeStateStatus projection.

item.title: feat: add ECC2 local control pane (#2131)
item.description: * feat: add ECC2 local control pane * fix: refresh control pane package locks * test: harden control pane coverage * test: allow portable control pane shutdown * test: retry local control pane fetches * fix: harden control pane error handling * fix: wrap control pane metadata

item.title: docs: define ECC platform value loop (#2119)
docs: record rc1 live package readbacks (#2117)
fix: surface warn-only PreToolUse hooks (#2084)
Add React language track with agents, skills, rules, and commands (#2024)
item.description: * feat(rules): add rules/react/ track Five rule files mirroring per-language convention (coding-style, hooks, patterns, security, testing). Each has `paths:` glob frontmatter for auto-activation when editing matching files. - coding-style.md: file extensions, naming, JSX, RSC boundary - hooks.md:

item.title: docs: neutralize public ECC metadata (#2083)
chore: export marketing campaign command
chore: sync catalog counts after PR triage
fix(docs): remove unicode verdict markers
docs(i18n): add German localization scout (#2029)
item.description: Adds de-DE docs, installer wiring, and locale tests. Pre-validated on current main with install manifest checks, markdownlint, locale-install tests, and ECC 2.0 release-surface tests.

item.title: fix(docs): wrap integration reference links
feat(integrations): add opt-in AURA trust adapter (#2026)
item.description: Adds a read-only opt-in AURA trust-check adapter. Synthetic merge passed validators and 22 AURA offline tests via uvx pytest.

item.title: feat(mcp): add Squish Memory server catalog entry (#2039)
item.description: Adds Squish Memory to the MCP server catalog. Pre-validated in a synthetic current-main merge.

item.title: feat: add marketing campaign agent skill and command (#2031)
item.description: Adds marketing-agent, marketing-campaign skill, and marketing-campaign command. Pre-validated in a synthetic current-main merge.

item.title: feat(skills): add social publisher skill (#2052)
item.description: Adds a SocialClaw-backed social-publisher skill. Pre-validated in a synthetic current-main merge.

item.title: feat(skills): add frontend accessibility skill (#2048)
item.description: Adds the frontend-a11y skill for React and Next.js accessibility patterns. Pre-validated against current main with validate-skills and markdownlint.

item.title: docs: sync live native payments gate evidence
Sync billing gate env-file evidence (#2021)
docs: sync selected-target announcement gate (#2020)
Sync Marketplace Pro readback release gate (#2019)
item.description: * docs: sync marketplace pro readback gate * docs: refresh operator dashboard after readback sync * docs: sanitize marketplace readback summary * docs: refresh operator dashboard after marketplace readback

item.title: docs: sync AgentShield dependabot evidence (#2018)
docs: sync AgentShield adapter evidence
docs: sync May 20 ECC Tools evidence
docs: sync late May 19 release roadmap state
Add release approval gate
docs(release): record post-gateguard evidence
docs: define ECC 2.0 hypergrowth release lane
item.description: Refresh the active 2.0 release surface for the affaan-m/ECC repo identity, update package/plugin/workflow launch metadata, and add an operator command center for release video, partner, sponsor, consulting, and social launch execution.
